fact: The yOS Program Mode candidate now includes two v0.1 documents stored in Notion: (1) yOS Semi-Autonomous Program Loop (https://app.notion.com/p/38d35e218cf881f9bafed883920c4353) and (2) GitHub Prompt Queue Protocol (https://app.notion.com/p/38d35e218cf881c3ad63c02130d6ad2f). Both are under: yOS → Cognitive Operating System → yOS Program Mode — Candidate Patterns (https://app.notion.com/p/38d35e218cf881ac9fbde1ddef4f41ce). They remain CANDIDATE_YOS_CORE_PATTERN_PENDING_NOTION_RECONCILIATION. GitHub backup: https://github.com/yj000018/elysium-civilizational-ontology/tree/main/07_YOS_PATTERN_LIBRARY
retry_instructions: Configure MEM0_API_KEY in Manus Secrets (Settings > Secrets > mem0) and re-run mem0_program_mode.py
